creator: peterj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Running g6e414739fc95 with a 32GB eMMC:

mmc1: Probing bus
sdhci_fdt0-slot0: Divider 267 for freq 375000 (base 200000000)
sdhci_fdt0-slot0: Divider 267 for freq 375000 (base 200000000)
mmc1: SD probe: failed
mmc1: MMC probe: OK (OCR: 0x001f8000)
sdhci_fdt0-slot0: Divider 267 for freq 375000 (base 200000000)
sdhci_fdt0-slot0: Divider 267 for freq 375000 (base 200000000)
mmc1: Current OCR: 0x001f8000
mmc1: Probing cards
mmc1: New card detected (CID ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff00)
mmc1: CMD3 failed, RESULT: 1
mmc1: Error setting RCA 1
sdhci_fdt0-slot0: Divider 267 for freq 375000 (base 200000000)
mmc1: setting transfer rate to 200.000MHz (HS400 with enhanced strobe timing)

The eMMC works through EFI booting but the kernel fails to attach to it.
